why_this_source_matters: Only direct mainland-versus-island floral-differentiation candidate among specialist-like focal taxa.
minimum_required_extraction: Trait mean; SD/SE/CI; n; exact population/island; table/figure locator for every reported floral trait.
locality_mapping_required: Map each sampled locality to mainland/ardens/no-Bombus only after inspecting the source locality table.
current_status: metadata verified; full result table not transcribed
blocking_item: Full article PDF or author manuscript plus locality table.
do_not_infer: Do not record a trait direction from the title; do not map generic Izu to a pollinator regime.

why_this_source_matters: Direct island/mainland morphology and pollinator-fauna comparison; already provides verified qualitative source-native evidence.
minimum_required_extraction: Trait mean; SD/SE/CI; n; exact island identities; population-level table/figure locator; pollinator sampling unit.
locality_mapping_required: Retain source-native comparisons until named Izu localities are mapped explicitly.
current_status: publisher abstract verified; full table and locality map not transcribed
blocking_item: Full article PDF or author manuscript; population table.
do_not_infer: Do not score qualitative shortening as an effect size; do not treat fauna difference as pollinator effectiveness.

why_this_source_matters: Independent insular/mainland variety comparison with floral traits and pollinator assemblages.
minimum_required_extraction: Trait mean; SD/SE/CI; n; variety/taxon identity; island and mainland localities; trait measurement definitions.
locality_mapping_required: Use only if comparison is not confounded by taxon/variety identity for the stated holdout question.
current_status: metadata/source route verified; table not transcribed
blocking_item: Full article PDF plus taxonomic-comparator review.
do_not_infer: Do not pool intervarietal differences as within-lineage island effects without an explicit sensitivity label.

why_this_source_matters: Useful natural-history contrast but explicitly between taxa.
minimum_required_extraction: No primary holdout extraction unless reframed as a between-taxon contextual comparison.
current_status: Comparator is between C. izuinsulare and C. trichotomum.
scoring_destination: Do not include in within-species prediction meta-analysis.
